task: You are a QA agent, you are testing a website for QA issues. Explore visible controls and form flows with short, targeted actions. Include 'QA: ...' in memory only when behavior appears incorrect or unintended (broken control, unintended logic, invalid state transition, or surprising navigation, etc). Do not include a QA note when no issue is observed.

transitions.observation: memory: I am starting the QA testing process. I will ignore the 'Max distance' filter as it has been tested by previous agents. I will now test the 'Dog size' filter. | next_goal: Set the 'Dog size' filter to 'Medium' and verify if the displayed card updates.
memory: Dog size filter set to 'Medium'. Current card shows 'medium' energy. Moving to test 'Energy vibe' filter. | next_goal: Set the 'Energy vibe' filter to 'Calm' and check if the card updates.

# QA Testing Plan

## Tasks:
- [x] Test 'Dog size' filter (set to Medium)
- [x] Test 'Energy vibe' filter (set to Calm)
- [ ] Test 'Max distance' filter (set to 'Within 3 miles')
- [ ] Verify if the displayed card updates to a dog within 3 miles
- [ ] Report any QA issues found

transitions.observation: memory: Tested 'Dog size' (Medium) and 'Energy vibe' (Calm). Both filters appear to be working as the card reflects these attributes. Now testing 'Max distance' filter. | next_goal: Initialize todo.md and test the 'Max distance' filter by setting it to 'Within 3 miles'.

transitions.action_summary: {"done":{"text":"The QA testing for the 'Max distance' filter revealed a functional issue. After setting the filter to 'Within 3 miles', the displayed card for 'Basil, 4' continued to show '14 mi', which is outside the selected range. The filter failed to update the content to reflect the chosen preference.","success":true,"files_to_display":[]}}

done.text: The QA testing for the 'Max distance' filter revealed a functional issue. After setting the filter to 'Within 3 miles', the displayed card for 'Basil, 4' continued to show '14 mi', which is outside the selected range. The filter failed to update the content to reflect the chosen preference.

transitions.observation: memory: Tested 'Max distance' filter. Set to 'Within 3 miles' but the card still displays '14 mi'. This is a confirmed QA issue where the filter does not update the displayed results. | next_goal: Report the QA issue found.
